SystemOverview.Description: Enterprise-grade platform for real-time emergency response, incident management, responder coordination, and situational awareness.
SystemOverview.Origin: SSgt Barton M. Mallory (Intelligence Officer, USAF) - (Note Reference Memorandum (2022)) - Watch Established 2018

Principle.name: Deterrence first
Principle.value: Preventing violence through visible, coordinated community presence

Principle.name: Sub-second activation
Principle.value: Voice phrases, click sequences, and dial recognition trigger alerts in under 2 seconds

Principle.name: Nearby citizen response
Principle.value: The nearest 8-10 people (typically within 100 feet) are summoned instantly

Principle.name: Documentation over confrontation
Principle.value: Responders are trained to record, not engage

Principle.name: Constitutional framework
Principle.value: Governance modeled on Article 1, Section 8, Clause 15 of the U.S. Constitution

Principle.name: Data sovereignty
Principle.value: Publicly audited private organization holds citizen data

DependencyInversion.rule: Inner layers never depend on outer layers

Layer.name: Domain
Layer.description: The core business logic and state of the system

Entity.name: Incident
Entity.description: Full lifecycle state machine for emergencies

Entity.name: Responder
Entity.description: Intelligent dispatch based on proximity, skill, and certification

Entity.name: Dispatch
Entity.description: The connection between an incident and a responder

Entity.name: DroneMission
Entity.description: Automated fleet telemetry and mission planning

Entity.name: DisasterEvent
Entity.description: Specialized disaster systems (earthquake, hurricane, wildfire, active shooter)

Entity.name: EvacuationRoute
Entity.description: Planned and active exit paths with capacity tracking

Entity.name: EvacuationCenter
Entity.description: Safe havens with resource and capacity management

Entity.name: Evidence
Entity.description: Digital chain of custody for emergency data

Entity.name: TriageAssessment
Entity.description: START triage and mass casualty operations

Entity.name: VitalSignsReading
Entity.description: Real-time health monitoring

Entity.name: WearableDevice
Entity.description: Integration with Apple Watch and Wear OS for SOS and health sync

Entity.name: Geofence
Entity.description: Virtual boundaries for responder coordination and safety

Entity.name: SarMission
Entity.description: Search and Rescue operations

Entity.name: CrimeAnalysisReport
Entity.description: Predictive analytics and threat assessment

Entity.name: MarketplaceItem
Entity.description: Safety-related equipment and services for community members

Entity.name: Pledge
Entity.description: Commitment by citizens to specific responder roles

Entity.name: CoverageZone
Entity.description: Assigned geographical area for a designated responder

Entity.name: MediaAsset
Entity.description: Encrypted video, audio, and image evidence

Entity.name: ResponderQuery
Entity.description: Context-aware interrogation/information collection from participants

Entity.name: MeshNode
Entity.description: Offline communication peer in the mesh network

ValueObject.name: HazardZone
ValueObject.description: Dynamic area of danger to be avoided

ValueObject.name: ContactInfo
ValueObject.description: Communication details for responders and users

ValueObject.name: Geohash
ValueObject.description: Spatial cell identifier for efficient proximity queries

ValueObject.name: VoronoiCell
ValueObject.description: Geometric partition for response area optimization

Event.name: IncidentCreated
Event.trigger: Panic Alert, SOS, or manual report

Event.name: EvacuationOrdered
Event.trigger: Jurisdictional authority or AI threat threshold

Event.name: HandoverInitiated
Event.trigger: Professional first responder arrival and scene contact

Event.name: ThreatDetected
Event.trigger: AI computer vision or NLP sensors

Event.name: AnomalyDetected
Event.trigger: Wearable health sync or sensor deviation

SubDomain.name: Marketplace
SubDomain.description: E-commerce for safety equipment and community services

SubDomain.name: DesignatedResponder
SubDomain.description: Program for pledged responders, pledges, coverage, and scoring

SubDomain.name: MediaAssets
SubDomain.description: Media domain: upload entities, metadata, and encryption

SubDomain.name: MeshNetwork
SubDomain.description: Mesh node domain: topology, peer discovery, and offline sync

SubDomain.name: Geohashing
SubDomain.description: Spatial cells and multi-level precision coordination

SubDomain.name: AdvancedMapping
SubDomain.description: Topological maps, 3D GPS, CCTV integration, and indoor routing

Pattern.name: Mediator
Pattern.description: Decouples request processing from request dispatching

Pattern.name: Validation
Pattern.description: Standardized validation of incoming commands and queries

Project.name: TheWatch.Application
Project.description: Core application handlers, commands, queries, DTOs, and pipeline behaviors

Project.name: TheWatch.AudioIngestion
Project.description: Real-time speech processing for SOS activation

Project.name: TheWatch.LostAndFound
Project.description: Missing persons and lost item tracking

Adapter.technologies: SignalR Hubs (10x), MQTT Bridge, gRPC, WebSockets
SQL Server, PostgreSQL (PostGIS), CosmosDB, Firebase/Firestore, EventStore, Redis, Neo4j, MongoDB, MariaDB, QDrant
OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, HuggingFace, MistralAI, Azure Cognitive Services, Semantic Kernel, Autogen, ML.NET, Langgraph
Drone Telemetry, Wearable Sync (Apple Watch/Wear OS), Mesh Networking (Offline Capability)
Azure Service Bus, AWS SQS, MediatR, RabbitMQ, Kafka, EventHub
Hangfire, .NET BackgroundService, Azure Functions, Durable Task Scheduling
Logic Apps, MCP Server, KM Functions

Project.name: TheWatch.Logging
Project.description: Structured logging, Serilog sinks, log aggregation

Project.name: TheWatch.Security
Project.description: Encryption, authorization, audit trail, compliance enforcement

Project.name: TheWatch.Persistence
Project.description: EF Core, repositories, unit of work, migrations

Project.name: TheWatch.ML
Project.description: ML.NET models, prediction pipelines, training jobs

Project.name: TheWatch.Realtime
Project.description: SignalR hubs, WebSocket management, live push

Project.name: TheWatch.Authentication
Project.description: Auth0, Firebase Auth, Azure AD, MFA, biometric

Project.name: TheWatch.EventHub
Project.description: Azure Event Hub ingestion and processing

Client.name: MAUI
Client.features: Wearable Integration, Offline Mode, SOS Trigger, Full mobile client

Layer.name: Shared
Layer.description: Cross-cutting shared code, analyzers, and constants

Project.name: TheWatch.Analyzers
Project.description: 39 custom Roslyn Analyzers (TW1001-TW6003) enforcing architecture rules at compile time

Project.name: TheWatch.Shared
Project.description: Shared constants, enums, and cross-cutting utilities

Layer.name: Workers
Layer.description: Background job definitions and hosted service implementations

Layer.name: Libraries
Layer.description: Reusable UI component libraries for Blazor and MAUI

Library.name: TheWatch.UI.Core
Library.description: Core UI primitives and base components

Library.name: TheWatch.UI.Notifications
Library.description: Toast, banner, and push notification UI

Layer.name: Aspire
Layer.description: .NET Aspire orchestration, service defaults, and local dev experience

Project.name: TheWatch.AppHost
Project.description: Aspire AppHost — orchestrates all services for local development

Project.name: TheWatch.ServiceDefaults
Project.description: Shared service configuration: OpenTelemetry, health checks, resilience

Concept.name: Clean Architecture
Concept.description: Dependency rule where inner layers don't know about outer layers

Concept.name: Event Sourcing
Concept.description: Capturing all state changes as a sequence of events

Concept.name: CQRS / Mediator
Concept.description: Separating read and write operations, decoupled via MediatR

Concept.name: Solid Principles
Concept.description: Single Responsibility, Open/Closed, Liskov Substitution, Interface Segregation, Dependency Inversion

Concept.name: Vertical Slice Architecture
Concept.description: Organizing code by feature rather than layer for specific modules

Concept.name: Multi-Tenancy
Concept.description: Supporting various jurisdictions and organizations with data isolation

Concept.name: Identity Management
Concept.description: Auth0, Firebase Auth, and Azure AD integration

Concept.name: Governance
Concept.description: Sarbanes-Oxley-grade public audits and elected Sheriff oversight

Concept.name: AI Ethics Governance
Concept.description: Framework for responsible AI application in public safety

TestType.name: Unit
TestType.focus: Domain entities, Value Objects, and Business rules

TestType.name: E2E
TestType.focus: User-to-Responder lifecycle across Mobile and API

TestType.name: Performance
TestType.focus: Sub-second activation SLAs and high-concurrency SignalR hubs

Framework.name: FedRAMP
Framework.description: Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program

Framework.name: HIPAA
Framework.description: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act

Service.name: Encryption
Service.technologies: AES-256 (At Rest), RSA (Key Exchange), Field-level DB Encryption

Tool.name: GitHub Actions
Tool.description: 14 automated workflows for build, test, and deploy

Capability.name: IncidentManagement
Capability.features: Auto-deduplication, Escalation timers, Evidence chain of custody

Capability.name: ResponderCoordination
Capability.features: Proximity dispatch (Haversine), Skill/Certification matching, Fatigue tracking

Capability.name: FirstContactProtocols
Capability.features: Scene handover, Professional credential verification, Incident brief automation

Capability.name: DisasterResponse
Capability.features: 10 specialized systems (Earthquake, Wildfire, Active Shooter, etc.)

Capability.name: EvacuationManagement
Capability.features: Route optimization, Capacity tracking, Real-time hazard avoidance

Capability.name: ActiveThreatProtocols
Capability.features: DHS/ALERRT Run-Hide-Fight engine, CBRN response, School safety

Capability.name: MedicalAndTriage
Capability.features: START triage, Vital sign monitoring, Fall detection

Capability.name: GeospatialIntelligence
Capability.features: Geofencing, Isochrone analysis, Voronoi partitioning, 3D mapping

Capability.name: ColdCasesAndMissingPersons
Capability.features: Cold case analysis, Missing persons tracking, Library of Congress integration

Capability.name: VideoIntelligence
Capability.features: Live video streaming, Object detection, Footage collection, Text-to-speech narration

Capability.name: MeshCommunications
Capability.features: Offline mesh networking, Peer discovery, Message relay

Capability.name: WearableHealth
Capability.features: Apple Watch/Wear OS sync, Vital signs, Fall detection, SOS trigger
